Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Susan Lee.
Atty. Matt Losinski, Esq. for Plaintiff: CHU SHEK KAM, HOIYIN KAM, ET. AL.
HOIYIN KAM ALSO ACTED AS AN INTERPRETER FOR HER FATHER.
NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT MAURICE BRADLEY.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.
(PRINCIPAL AMOUNT - $1,927,938.00)
